code:
import{db}from'./config';import{collection,getDocs,getDoc,doc,query,where,addDoc,updateDoc,deleteDoc,orderBy,Timestamp,limit}from'firebase/firestore';import{mockCompanies,mockRaffles}from'./mockData';// Use mock data for development
const USE_MOCK_DATA=false;// Collections
export const companiesCollection=collection(db,'companies');export const rafflesCollection=collection(db,'raffles');export const carFeaturesCollection=collection(db,'carFeatures');export const appSettingsCollection=collection(db,'appSettings');// Get all companies
export const getCompanies=async()=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA){return mockCompanies;}const snapshot=await getDocs(companiesCollection);return snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));};// Get a specific company
export const getCompany=async companyId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA){const company=mockCompanies.find(c=>c.id===companyId);return company||null;}const docRef=doc(db,'companies',companyId);const docSnap=await getDoc(docRef);if(docSnap.exists()){return{id:docSnap.id,...docSnap.data()};}else{return null;}};// Create a new company
export const createCompany=async company=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return{id:'mock-id-'+Date.now()};const docRef=await addDoc(companiesCollection,{...company,createdAt:Timestamp.now()});return{id:docRef.id};};// Update a company
export const updateCompany=async(companyId,data)=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'companies',companyId);await updateDoc(docRef,data);return true;};// Delete a company
export const deleteCompany=async companyId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'companies',companyId);await deleteDoc(docRef);return true;};// Get raffles by company ID
export const getRafflesByCompany=async companyId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA){return mockRaffles.filter(raffle=>raffle.companyId===companyId);}const q=query(rafflesCollection,where('companyId','==',companyId),orderBy('createdAt','desc'));const snapshot=await getDocs(q);return snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));};// Get all active raffles
export const getActiveRaffles=async()=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA){return mockRaffles.filter(raffle=>raffle.status==='active');}const q=query(rafflesCollection,where('status','==','active'),orderBy('createdAt','desc'));const snapshot=await getDocs(q);return snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));};// Get a specific raffle
export const getRaffle=async raffleId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA){const raffle=mockRaffles.find(r=>r.id===raffleId);return raffle||null;}const docRef=doc(db,'raffles',raffleId);const docSnap=await getDoc(docRef);if(docSnap.exists()){return{id:docSnap.id,...docSnap.data()};}else{return null;}};// Create a new raffle
export const createRaffle=async raffle=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return{id:'mock-id-'+Date.now()};const docRef=await addDoc(rafflesCollection,{...raffle,createdAt:Timestamp.now()});return{id:docRef.id};};// Update a raffle
export const updateRaffle=async(raffleId,data)=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'raffles',raffleId);await updateDoc(docRef,data);return true;};// Update car specifications for a raffle
export const updateCarSpecifications=async(raffleId,specifications)=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'raffles',raffleId);await updateDoc(docRef,{carSpecifications:specifications});return true;};// Delete a raffle
export const deleteRaffle=async raffleId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'raffles',raffleId);await deleteDoc(docRef);return true;};// Car features management
export const getAllCarFeatures=async()=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return[];const snapshot=await getDocs(carFeaturesCollection);return snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));};export const createCarFeature=async feature=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return{id:'mock-id-'+Date.now()};const docRef=await addDoc(carFeaturesCollection,feature);return{id:docRef.id};};export const updateCarFeature=async(featureId,data)=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'carFeatures',featureId);await updateDoc(docRef,data);return true;};export const deleteCarFeature=async featureId=>{if(USE_MOCK_DATA)return true;const docRef=doc(db,'carFeatures',featureId);await deleteDoc(docRef);return true;};// App Settings
export const getAppSettings=async()=>{try{const q=query(appSettingsCollection,limit(1));const querySnapshot=await getDocs(q);if(querySnapshot.empty)return null;const settingsDoc=querySnapshot.docs[0];return{id:settingsDoc.id,...settingsDoc.data()};}catch(error){console.error('Ошибка получения настроек приложения:',error);throw error;}};export const updateAppSettings=async settingsData=>{try{// Проверяем, существуют ли настройки
const settings=await getAppSettings();if(settings){// Обновляем существующие настройки
const settingsRef=doc(appSettingsCollection,settings.id);await updateDoc(settingsRef,{...settingsData,updatedAt:Timestamp.now()});}else{// Создаем новые настройки
await addDoc(appSettingsCollection,{appName:settingsData.appName||'АвтоШанс',logoUrl:settingsData.logoUrl||'',heroImageUrl:settingsData.heroImageUrl||'',primaryColor:settingsData.primaryColor||'#1976D2',secondaryColor:settingsData.secondaryColor||'#2196F3',contactEmail:settingsData.contactEmail||'',contactPhone:settingsData.contactPhone||'',createdAt:Timestamp.now(),updatedAt:Timestamp.now()});}return true;}catch(error){console.error('Ошибка обновления настроек приложения:',error);return false;}};
